_comment: Gallery security headers (FIND-I4-005 / TICKET-I4-005). Start permissive on script-src / style-src because Astro hoists inline <script>/<style> blocks; tighten with per-script nonces when FIND-I4-005 follow-up lands. PDFs under /packs/**/*.pdf get X-Content-Type-Options so a mis-served HTML file can't be sniffed as a PDF.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'
camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
